name: smart-slides
description: Create, edit, preview, and render standalone smart-slides videos locally with Jogg assets.

interface.shortDescription: Build and render Jogg-powered smart slides locally.
interface.longDescription: Runs an extracted Video Studio editor and renderer locally, using Jogg for per-shot speech and selected avatar scenes plus optional Pexels or Pixabay B-roll.
defaultPrompt: 生成一个 10 分钟视频，数字人只出现在开场和结尾。
打开并编辑我的 Smart Slides 项目。
继续未完成的本地视频渲染。
